input: raw request body bytes — NO JSON canonicalization, NO key sorting, whitespace-significant
note: Frozen reference: synapse-go/idempotency.BodyHash. Do NOT modify without updating Java conformance test.

cases.name: empty_body
cases.description: empty byte slice — SHA-256 of zero bytes

cases.name: utf8_chinese_json
cases.description: UTF-8 multibyte JSON — Go hashes raw UTF-8 bytes, not code-points

cases.name: json_with_extra_whitespace
cases.description: same semantic JSON as simple_json but with spaces — whitespace IS significant; hash differs

cases.name: json_compact_same_content
cases.description: exact same bytes as simple_json — hash is identical, confirming stability

cases.name: json_different_key_order
cases.description: same fields as simple_json but different key order — hash differs (no canonicalization)

cases.name: tampered_body
cases.description: 1-byte difference from simple_json (amount 100→101) — hash must differ

cases.name: lowercase_hex_confirm
cases.description: confirms encoding is lowercase hex (no uppercase letters in output)
